The first year, circa December 2021
Last year's video, ft. my actual wedding dress
And finally, this year's edition of "What I'd Look Like in a Hallmark Movie"

item.title: I beat cancer.
item.description:
I did it. I’m recovering from a total hysterectomy that I had about two weeks ago. I am stressed out and worried about bills and trying to push my limits to work even though I’m not supposed to, so I thought I’d share my gofundme again. Please only donate if you have it to spare, I don’t want to put anyone out. I’m trying to be kind to myself and remember that if there were ever an acceptable time to ask for help, it’s now.
I also made a PayPal one, since folks seem to prefer one or the other. I have also reopened my art shop, and will keep it open as long as I can manage it physically. https://www.paypal.com/pools/c/909Yievk5O https://gofund.me/e2819a5d Shop: huntersmooncollective.carrd.co
A short list of other notable problems they found within the organs they removed. This nonsense in particular explains a lot of the issues I had with exhaustion, intense abdominal pain, depression, and other symptoms. Hopefully that all clears up as I heal. Right now I just feel totally useless and isolated and it’s just been a rough year and I just don’t feel comfortable. I’m trying so hard to keep it optimistic. I’m trying not to be pissed that I had to listen to doctors tell me to “lose 20lbs and see if that helps.” Ironically, I have lost 20lbs since my surgery, which the OB says was probably retained fluid and will likely slow down from here out.
Cat tax. Moose up top, Porkchop to the left, Jinx to the right. They’ve stayed close. Overall, I am trying to cheer up. I beat cancer. Not that I should have ever had it in the first place, you know, but whatever. I’m trying not to hang on to that anger, but it’s just taking some time for me to work through. The long version: So you don’t have to sift through old posts for the whole story, I was basically gaslit by doctors (america) for over four years with complaints of abdominal pain, low energy, depression, horrible periods, intrusive thoughts, and a handful of other issues. It took having a total meltdown in the hallway of a Planned Parenthood after being told that they couldn’t do everything I needed them to in one visit because they wanted to bill my insurance more than once. They called two days later to tell me I had cancer. That was in August. It’s been a really bad time. I’ve dealt with s**cidal ideation for about twenty of my 33 years on this planet, and it had become completely unmanageable in the past couple years. I was so tired of feeling like shit all the time and just didn’t want to do it anymore. Today is a really bad day for me, and it’s hard writing about this because it was the blatant negligence from medical professionals that almost killed me, just in a roundabout way. I would have absolutely finished the job if they hadn’t found this. I do feel better. I have more energy, mostly, and although healing is slow and hurts a lot and I’m so stressed about money, I am at least thinking about the future instead of the end. Here’s to the future.
item.dc:creator: wildsageHMC

item.title: His attorney claimed "Freeman and Moss are asking for `the civil equivalent of the death penalty."
item.description: "Giuliani has repeatedly highlighted how he doesn’t have funds to pay his various debts or to respond to the case." “Because Giuliani hasn’t responded to many subpoenas in the lawsuit, attorneys for Freeman and Moss said in court they couldn’t find a number. He’s already been fined more than $200,000 for some of Freeman and Moss’ attorneys’ fees, which he hasn’t paid.” "Giuliani also owed more than $1 million to defense attorneys who’ve helped him on other matters, prompting them to sue him this year, and hadn’t paid nearly $60,000 for years-old unpaid phone bills. Yet at times he’s had help – including from Trump – to try to fundraise to offset some of his debts, and he was able to take a private plane to his arrest on criminal charges related to 2020 election interference in Georgia this summer." "A few months ago, Giuliani listed his 3-bedroom Manhattan apartment for sale. It’s still on the market, for $6.1 million, according to public real estate listings." "It’s also not clear if Giuliani would be able to declare bankruptcy to shield himself from any sum of damages in this lawsuit. That issue, according to people familiar with the case, may have to be decided by the courts at a later time, and it’s possible he could still be on the hook for the award to Freeman and Moss, even if he goes into bankruptcy." https://www.cnn.com/2023/12/15/politics/rudy-giuliani-verdict-pay-defamed-election-workers/index.html
item.dc:creator: MenloPart

item.title: One meme dump in honour of the sweetest cat ever
item.description: This was Sunny, the sweetest little bean ever. He lived for 15 years and saw the best and worst of all our lives. He was there on the mornings of my stepmum and my stepsisters weddings while they were getting ready, for my nephews birth and him starting school, helping me study through major exams, my dad's operation recovery and my brothers graduation to name just a few in the last few years. Sunny looked after my stepmum every day for 15 years, and took care of all of us right up until the end. And sadly today he passed from advanced cancer and dementia. He held on and made sure that everyone, but especially my stepmum, was going to be OK, and he was just the absolute best, you'd never see a more kind and sweet pet. Sunny genuinely sat by her side every single night without fail. He was a true companion through thick and thin, not once leaving anyone's side if they needed him, even if that meant hiding his own pain, and now he can be free. I wouldnt normally put pictures like this on the internet but he deserves a send off fit for a king and everyone should know how amazing he was and what he did for the people around him. You'd always have a true friend in sunny, he stuck by everyone right up until the end. Sunny just wanted everyone to be OK, so I attached some memes to hopefully make you smile
item.dc:creator: Thecheesymemelord

item.title: The 370th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - D&D MeeMays ep 5
item.description:
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
Starting January 1st, I will have a new Signature Image. One I had commissioned. It's so cute. FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #DandD #DandDump #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple

item.title: It's been one week since you adopted me.
item.description:
Took me home in your car and now I'm baby.
Seven days since you paid my fee.
And now I'm on the couch and really sleepy.
I like to roll on the floor and show my belly.
Hi. I'm a really sweet boy and my name's Beverly!
item.dc:creator: Nephelus

item.title: Making pact with a local fairy.
item.description: Sauce: https://www.instagram.com/reel/C0zZ7hNLxti/?igshid=MzRlODBiNWFlZA Hey Imgurian, thank you for the accolade! May you enjoy whatever pact you make, and always know you have a pizza my heart!✨ Good evening Imgurian, I didn't forget you but I did have to make the monies first. It doesn't take a hag stone to clearly see that you have a pizza my heart. Thank you for the accolade!✨ You know what Imgurian, I'm glad you were entertained! Thrilled even! After a hard week you deserve a sensible chuckle, a delighted giggle, even a gleeful cackle! So thank you for the accolade and have a great weekend!✨ By being such a gem yourself Imgurian, you know great things and therefore I am humbled that you enjoyed my post. Please keep being a gem and please have a most excellent weekend!✨
item.dc:creator: HorrorMango

item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: Feijoa are weird
item.description:
A friend of mine gifted me a kilo of feijoa fruit. They're native to South America but these were grown in Oregon and I found out about them from New Zealanders. Raw like this they smell like sunscreen with an undercurrent of wintergreen. Does that sound weird? Well it's likely accurate then because they smell weird.
They're sometimes called "pineapple guavas" but aren't actually guavas though both are from the myrtle family. The flesh does taste a bit like pineapple: similarly tart with some tropical fruitiness. Not bad. Not remarkable.
I decided to make jam but chutney is the other thing my kiwi friends recommended. Peeling and chopping them was kinda tedious but not hard. They naturally have a ton of pectin so sugar and lemon juice were the only additions.
The "sunscreen" aroma that was dominant when raw, diminished with the skins removed, and mostly cooked off. The fruity flavors intensified quite a bit. The result isn't subtle but it is hard to describe. It makes me think of over-ripe strawberries combined with grape soda. And that wintergreen smell I mentioned before is still hanging around.
It jelled up very nicely and is an attractive, amber color. It was pretty interesting but I'm not sure I'd make it again.
item.dc:creator: 4lmonddragon

item.title: While our congress screws balks at sending more arms to Ukraine...
item.description:
Okay, math quiz: Which is a higher price? A few billion in arms for Ukraine or the life of ONE American soldier (among thousands!) who would be fighting in Europe when Putin (as he has already stated) attacks the Balkans, Germany, and the rest of NATO? Now call and or write your congressmen and senators and tell them what you figured out (and what those morons already know, but don't care about). Demand that we continue to support Ukraine as they defend Europe and their own sovereign nation.
Sorry for the messed up title. Tired and sick this week...
item.dc:creator: SonsofLibertyArise
